title: Lock-Free Ring Buffer
description: Implement a fixed-size ring buffer (circular buffer) in C with proper memory management and thread-safe single-producer single-consumer operations.
requirements: Implement ring_buffer_push(rb, data, size) returning bytes written
Implement ring_buffer_pop(rb, buf, size) returning bytes read
Use power-of-2 capacity for efficient modulo via bitmask
Handle wraparound correctly at buffer boundaries

few_shot_examples.prompt: Allocate a buffer with error checking in C.
Calculate power of 2 ceiling for a given value.
